overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a rain-soaked Night City at night. The journey begins along a neon-lit waterfront promenade, ascends stairs to an upper concourse, passes through a dramatically lit underpass, and continues along busy city streets with futuristic traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade with palm trees

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing runs across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet waterfront promenade toward the illuminated city skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing running across the path from right to left

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete structure with stair access and red accent lighting
line of palm trees along the waterfront railing
cluster of illuminated futuristic skyscrapers with neon windows
metal railing separating the walkway from the water
rain-soaked concrete reflecting neon lights and building illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked waterfront promenade at night, with a massive concrete building on the left and palm trees lining the right side. The futuristic Night City skyline glows in the distance through the hazy rain, while neon reflections shimmer on the wet pavement. A pedestrian briefly crosses the path from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs ascending alongside the building

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete stairs alongside the building

agents.ego_description: ascending the wide concrete stairs alongside the building facade

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings ascending alongside the building

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase attached to the building, moving upward from the waterfront level. The palm trees and railing fall away as the elevation increases, bringing the character closer to the overpass structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper walkway with neon storefronts under overpass

events.description: passing bright pink neon storefront creating vivid color reflections

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper concourse passing pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian walkway under the overpass structure
storefront with bright magenta neon lighting and signage
row of yellow public benches along the right side
concrete ceiling of the overpass structure overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated concourse under the overpass, the scene features vibrant pink neon storefronts and yellow benches. The space is sheltered from the rain but still open to the sides, with the palm trees now visible below at a distance. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with dramatic blue and red neon lighting

events.description: entering underpass tunnel with blue neon strip lighting
transitioning from blue underpass lighting to red ambient street lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the neon-lit underpass descending toward street level

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with smooth walls and dramatic lighting
horizontal cyan-blue neon light strip running along the wall
orange traffic barriers separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
city street with multiple lanes of futuristic vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The character enters a concrete underpass illuminated by striking blue neon strips that cast an otherworldly glow on the wet surfaces. As the tunnel opens toward the street, the lighting shifts dramatically to red ambient tones from the traffic and streetlights above, revealing the busy multi-lane road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street sidewalk with traffic and illuminated billboards

events.description: exiting underpass onto city sidewalk next to moving traffic
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street with red taillights

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Brookland' suspended over the intersection
tall pole with traffic signals and green light illuminated
large digital billboards and advertisements on building facades
tall glass and steel buildings with extensive window lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass onto a busy city sidewalk, the character walks alongside a multi-lane road with moderate futuristic traffic. The Brookland street sign is visible ahead at the intersection, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in illuminated billboards and neon advertisements. Pedestrians walk in the same direction along the wet pavement as vehicles pass by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked waterfront promenade that ascends and transitions into the dense, neon-saturated heart of the city. It begins along a wet walkway lined with palm trees and a massive concrete building, with the distant skyline glowing through a hazy rain. As the character ascends a wide concrete staircase, the waterfront falls away, leading the camera onto an elevated concourse characterized by vibrant pink storefronts and yellow benches. The scene then shifts into a concrete underpass illuminated by striking blue neon strips before the lighting dramatically turns red as the tunnel opens toward the street. Finally, the camera emerges onto a busy sidewalk at the Brookland intersection, moving past futuristic traffic and towering skyscrapers draped in illuminated billboards.
